notes: Tool surface lints 1:1 against FIDELITY.md; REST surface lints 1:1 against FIDELITY_MATRIX.md (FIDELITY.md documents REST as prose). Heat tiers ruled 2026-07-11 on F-729 (list 2/3 + [DECISION], approve-as-drafted); annotations landed via F-735. Evidence codes per packages/sdk/ENDPOINT-TIERS.md. Warm surfaces implemented at semantic stay code-unchanged per the M5 additive-only ruling and are listed in FIDELITY.md's tier-mismatch ledger.

tools.name: push_files
tools.justification: TC:authoring (ruled F-729); MCP:repos. MCP-only surface — no REST route backs it, which the rubric treats as legal (kind: mcp, ruled F-729).

tools.name: list_repository_labels
tools.justification: TC:issue-triage (ruled F-729): label reads+apply are on the triage chain; vendor puts label writes opt-in — task chain wins (disagreement noted).

tools.name: create_label
tools.justification: Warm (ruled F-729, G4): taxonomy authoring, a rare side step off TC:issue-triage; MCP: vendor label writes are opt-in. Fidelity semantic > shape target → tier-mismatch ledger (additive-only, no demotion this milestone).

tools.name: add_issue_labels
tools.justification: TC:issue-triage (ruled F-729); vendor label writes are opt-in — task chain wins (disagreement noted).

tools.name: remove_issue_label
tools.justification: TC:issue-triage (ruled F-729); vendor label writes are opt-in — task chain wins (disagreement noted).

tools.name: list_collaborators
tools.justification: MCP:repos (ruled F-729); collaborator reads sit on triage and review chains.

tools.name: update_pull_request_branch
tools.justification: TC:author-review-merge (ruled F-729); MCP:pull_requests (default-on). Hot gap filled by F-735: semantic merge of base into head with a real merge commit.

tools.name: delete_branch
tools.justification: TC:cleanup-after-merge (ruled F-729); no vendor tool — task chain wins (disagreement noted).

tools.name: compare_commits
tools.justification: Warm (ruled F-729): occasional cross-branch inspection off the TC:code-read chain. Shape is exactly at target.

tools.name: get_pull_request_diff
tools.justification: TC:author-review-merge (ruled F-729); MCP:pull_requests. Hot gap, explicitly deferred (F-729 ruling point G1): byte-accurate patch modeling is out of the M5 window; placeholder patches remain (divergence #2). Follow-up post-M5.

tools.name: list_milestones
tools.justification: Warm (ruled F-729, G2): adjacent to TC:issue-triage (triage-filter reads), warm over cold; MCP: no vendor milestone tools. Fidelity semantic > shape target → tier-mismatch ledger (additive-only, no demotion this milestone).

tools.name: create_milestone
tools.justification: Warm (ruled F-729, G2): weak chain adjacent to TC:issue-triage; MCP: no vendor milestone tools. Fidelity semantic > shape target → tier-mismatch ledger (additive-only, no demotion this milestone).

tools.name: update_milestone
tools.justification: Warm (ruled F-729, G2): weak chain adjacent to TC:issue-triage; MCP: no vendor milestone tools. Fidelity semantic > shape target → tier-mismatch ledger (additive-only, no demotion this milestone).

tools.name: delete_milestone
tools.justification: Warm (ruled F-729, G2): weak chain adjacent to TC:issue-triage; MCP: no vendor milestone tools. Fidelity semantic > shape target → tier-mismatch ledger (additive-only, no demotion this milestone).

tools.name: create_commit_status
tools.justification: SB (ruled F-729): the sealed twin must mint CI state for the merge-gate chain to be exercisable; vendor actions toolset is opt-in — task chain wins (disagreement noted).

tools.name: create_check_run
tools.justification: SB (ruled F-729): mints check state so the merge-gate chain is exercisable; vendor actions toolset is opt-in — task chain wins (disagreement noted).

tools.name: create_release
tools.justification: Warm (ruled F-729, G4): rarer chain adjacent to TC:release-notes; MCP: no vendor write tool. Fidelity semantic > shape target → tier-mismatch ledger (additive-only, no demotion this milestone).

tools.name: add_collaborator
tools.justification: Warm (ruled F-729, G4): admin-flavored and rare; MCP: no vendor tool. Fidelity semantic > shape target → tier-mismatch ledger (additive-only, no demotion this milestone).

tools.name: search_commits
tools.justification: TC:code-read (ruled F-729, G3); MCP:repos (default-on). Hot gap filled by F-735: substring search over default-branch commit messages and authors.

tools.name: get_release_by_tag
tools.justification: TC:release-notes (ruled F-729, G3); MCP:repos (default-on). Hot gap filled by F-735.

tools.name: get_tag
tools.justification: TC:release-notes (ruled F-729, G3); MCP:repos (default-on). Hot gap filled by F-735. MCP-only surface (kind: mcp): backed by the tags table; git-plumbing REST stays cold per the ruling.

rest.name: GET /repos/:owner/:repo
rest.justification: TC:code-read (ruled F-729); MCP:repos.

rest.name: POST /user/repos
rest.justification: TC:authoring (ruled F-729); MCP:repos. Row added by F-735 (doc-drift fix: implemented route was missing from FIDELITY_MATRIX.md).

rest.name: POST /orgs/:owner/repos
rest.justification: TC:authoring (ruled F-729); MCP:repos. Row added by F-735 (doc-drift fix).

rest.justification: TC:authoring (ruled F-729); MCP:repos. Row added by F-735 (doc-drift fix).

rest.justification: TC:code-read (ruled F-729); MCP:repos. Row added by F-735 (doc-drift fix).

rest.name: POST /repos/:owner/:repo/git/refs

rest.name: POST /repos/:owner/:repo/labels
rest.justification: Warm (ruled F-729, G4, create_label counterpart): taxonomy authoring, a rare side step off TC:issue-triage; MCP: vendor label writes are opt-in. Fidelity semantic > shape target → tier-mismatch ledger. Row added by F-735 (doc-drift fix).

rest.name: GET /repos/:owner/:repo/issues/:number/labels
rest.justification: TC:issue-triage (ruled F-729). Row added by F-735 (doc-drift fix).

rest.name: POST /repos/:owner/:repo/issues/:number/labels
rest.justification: TC:issue-triage (ruled F-729); vendor label writes are opt-in — task chain wins (disagreement noted). Row added by F-735 (doc-drift fix).

rest.name: DELETE /repos/:owner/:repo/issues/:number/labels/:name
rest.justification: TC:issue-triage (ruled F-729); vendor label writes are opt-in — task chain wins (disagreement noted). Row added by F-735 (doc-drift fix).

rest.name: POST /repos/:owner/:repo/issues/:number/assignees
rest.justification: TC:issue-triage (ruled F-729); MCP:issues. Row added by F-735 (doc-drift fix).

rest.name: GET /repos/:owner/:repo/collaborators
rest.justification: MCP:repos (ruled F-729); collaborator reads sit on triage and review chains.

rest.name: GET /repos/:owner/:repo/collaborators/:username
rest.justification: MCP:repos (ruled F-729); collaborator membership probe on review chains.

rest.name: PUT /repos/:owner/:repo/collaborators/:username
rest.justification: Warm (ruled F-729, G4, add_collaborator counterpart): admin-flavored and rare; MCP: no vendor tool. Fidelity semantic > shape target → tier-mismatch ledger (additive-only, no demotion this milestone).

rest.name: GET /repos/:owner/:repo/pulls
rest.justification: TC:author-review-merge (ruled F-729); MCP:pull_requests.

rest.name: POST /repos/:owner/:repo/pulls

rest.name: GET /repos/:owner/:repo/pulls/:number/*
rest.justification: TC:author-review-merge (ruled F-729); MCP:pull_requests. Covers PR detail/files/reviews/comments/status reads plus the PUT merge and update-branch mutations; update-branch upgraded to a semantic merge by F-735.

rest.name: GET /repos/:owner/:repo/pulls/:number/commits
rest.justification: TC:author-review-merge (ruled F-729); MCP:pull_requests.

rest.name: GET /repos/:owner/:repo/pulls/:number/diff
rest.justification: TC:author-review-merge (ruled F-729); MCP:pull_requests. Hot gap, explicitly deferred (F-729 ruling point G1): byte-accurate patches are out of the M5 window (divergence #2). Follow-up post-M5.

rest.name: POST /repos/:owner/:repo/pulls/:number/comments/:comment_id/replies

rest.justification: Warm (ruled F-729, G2): adjacent to TC:issue-triage (triage-filter reads), warm over cold; MCP: no vendor milestone tools. Fidelity semantic > shape target → tier-mismatch ledger (additive-only, no demotion this milestone).

rest.name: POST /repos/:owner/:repo/milestones
rest.justification: Warm (ruled F-729, G2): weak chain adjacent to TC:issue-triage; MCP: no vendor milestone tools. Fidelity semantic > shape target → tier-mismatch ledger (additive-only, no demotion this milestone).

rest.name: PATCH /repos/:owner/:repo/milestones/:number
rest.justification: Warm (ruled F-729, G2): weak chain adjacent to TC:issue-triage; MCP: no vendor milestone tools. Fidelity semantic > shape target → tier-mismatch ledger (additive-only, no demotion this milestone).

rest.name: DELETE /repos/:owner/:repo/milestones/:number
rest.justification: Warm (ruled F-729, G2): weak chain adjacent to TC:issue-triage; MCP: no vendor milestone tools. Fidelity semantic > shape target → tier-mismatch ledger (additive-only, no demotion this milestone).

rest.name: GET /repos/:owner/:repo/tags
rest.justification: TC:code-read (ruled F-729); MCP:repos.

rest.name: GET /repos/:owner/:repo/releases
rest.justification: TC:release-notes (ruled F-729); MCP:repos.

rest.name: GET /repos/:owner/:repo/releases/latest
rest.justification: TC:release-notes (ruled F-729); MCP:repos.

rest.name: GET /repos/:owner/:repo/releases/tags/:tag
rest.justification: TC:release-notes (ruled F-729, G3); MCP:repos (default-on). Hot gap filled by F-735 (get_release_by_tag counterpart).

rest.name: POST /repos/:owner/:repo/releases
rest.justification: Warm (ruled F-729, G4, create_release counterpart): rarer chain adjacent to TC:release-notes; MCP: no vendor write tool. Fidelity semantic > shape target → tier-mismatch ledger (additive-only, no demotion this milestone).

rest.name: GET /user
rest.justification: TC:bootstrap (ruled F-729); MCP:context.

rest.name: GET /search/*
rest.justification: TC:code-read + TC:issue-triage (ruled F-729); MCP:repos,issues,users. Covers /search/repositories, /search/code, /search/issues, /search/users and, since F-735, /search/commits.

rest.name: GET /repos/:owner/:repo/actions/*
rest.justification: PS (ruled F-729): Actions runs/jobs/logs are cold now — top post-M5 promotion candidate (CI-debugging chain is real; vendor ships an opt-in toolset). Named cold row: agents probe it, so the loud 501 is documented and test-backed.

rest.name: GET /repos/:owner/:repo/git/trees/:sha
rest.justification: PS (ruled F-729): git plumbing (trees/blobs) stays cold; agents probe occasionally. Named cold row: loud 501 documented and test-backed.

rest.name: GET /orgs/:org/teams
rest.justification: PS (ruled F-729, G5): the twin models a single-actor repo sandbox, so teams/orgs stay cold despite the vendor's default-on get_teams — disagreement recorded as input to the next ruling. Named cold row: loud 501 documented and test-backed.

rest.name: GET /repos/:owner/:repo/issues/:number/sub_issues
rest.justification: PS (ruled F-729, G5): sub-issues stay cold despite the vendor's default-on sub_issue_write — disagreement recorded. Named cold row: loud 501 documented and test-backed.

rest.name: GET /orgs/:org/issue-types
rest.justification: PS (ruled F-729, G5): issue types/fields stay cold despite the vendor's default-on list_issue_types — disagreement recorded. Named cold row: loud 501 documented and test-backed.

rest.name: POST /mcp/call
rest.justification: Engine introspection (pome transport, not upstream GitHub surface) — outside the rubric's inventory scope per ENDPOINT-TIERS.md. Row retained until the post-F-440 surface-count reconcile (additive-only, same rationale as the twin-slack denominator deferral).

rest.name: POST /mcp/tools/:name
rest.justification: Engine introspection (pome transport, not upstream GitHub surface) — outside the rubric's inventory scope per ENDPOINT-TIERS.md. Row retained until the post-F-440 surface-count reconcile (additive-only).

rest.name: Any unsupported path
rest.justification: PS (ruled F-729): the loud-501 catch-all is the documented cold tail; unlisted surfaces (notifications, gists, discussions, projects, security families, stargazers) are implicitly cold and gain named rows only if traces show probes.
